data.title: Hong Kong's Finance Secretary highlights need for regulations in crypto sector at WEF workshop in Davos.
data.description: During a private workshop at Davos, Finance Secretary Paul Chan emphasized the need for regulatory oversight in the digital assets sector to complement innovation.

data.title: Investigation launched by KSF into Charles River Laboratories officers and directors amid concerns.
data.description: A recent press release from New York and New Orleans dated January 20, 2026, revealed that Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), has initiated an investigation into Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. This marks a significant development in the legal landscape, highlighting concerns about potential issues related to the company's operations. Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. is facing scrutiny as KSF delves into the matter with thoroughness and diligence. The investigation underscores the growing importance of corporate accountability and transparency in today's business environment. Stay tuned for further updates as more information unfolds in this investigation.

data.title: Investigation launched on Crocs officers & directors by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., the former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that their firm has initiated an investigation into Crocs, Inc. This investigation focuses on the company's actions and is being conducted following a disclosure about Crocs on the NasdaqGS.

data.title: Investigation initiated into Vestis Corporation officers and directors by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. Charles Foti leads probe.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Louisiana Attorney General and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that the law firm has launched a probe into Vestis Corporation. The investigation will focus on examining the activities and operations of Vestis, a company based in New York and New Orleans.

data.title: Investigation initiated on Hasbro by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC for potential misconduct by officers and directors.
data.description: In New York and New Orleans on January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., the former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, disclosed an ongoing inquiry by the firm into Hasbro, Inc. (NasdaqGS: HAS). The investigation, launched on October 26, 2023, aims to scrutinize the company's operations.

data.title: Investigation of Five Below, Inc. officers ongoing by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC on NasdaqGS: FIVE. Charles Foti leads.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Louisiana Attorney General and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, shared that the firm is actively looking into Five Below, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FIVE). This investigation stems from an event on July 16, 2024, concerning the company.

data.title: Investigation launched by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC into Fortrea Holdings, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FTRE) as of Jan 20, 2026.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, announced that the firm has begun an investigation into Fortrea Holdings, Inc. The investigation pertains to Fortrea Holdings, Inc.'s activities as listed on the NasdaqGS under ticker symbol FTRE. The investigation, initiated in June, seeks to analyze the company's financial and operational practices in detail.

data.title: The Michael J. Fox Foundation starts "Parkinson's IQ + You" event series in 2026 to educate and empower patients.
data.description: In 2019, a series of free events was initiated, with a total of 18 locations visited across the country. These events aim to educate and support individuals with Parkinson's disease in managing their condition, gaining insights into research opportunities, and accessing local resources. Patients and their families are urged to participate in these events, which provide comprehensive information and support.

data.title: AEP declares 95 cents per share quarterly dividend on common stock, payable on March 10, 2026.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on January 20, 2026, American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of 95 cents per share for its common stock. The dividend will be paid out on March 10, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of February [specified date].

data.title: AXA XL appoints Liz Rychling as Head of Broker Relations for Large Commercial and Mid-Market in Americas.
data.description: In New York on January 20, 2026, AXA XL announced the appointment of Liz Rychling as the Head of Broker Relations for Large Commercial and Mid-Market sectors in the Americas. Rychling, based in New York, will report to Matt O'Malley, who serves as the Chief Client and Distribution Officer for AXA XL in the Americas. This strategic move aims to bolster AXA XL's operations and enhance client relationships in the region.

data.title: USA Rare Earth stock (NASDAQ: USAR) surged after announcing expansion into Europe. Plans 3,750 metric ton production in France. French govt support.
data.description: USAR shares on NASDAQ are on the rise as the company, USA Rare Earth, Inc., enters the European market. Their subsidiary, Less Common Metals (LCM), will establish a plant in Lacq, France, with a production capacity of 3,750 metric tons annually. The French government, through the C3IV program, is backing this project. USAR stock is experiencing growth following this announcement. Further details can be found on financial news website Benzinga.com.
